articles.title: The Row's Menswear Breaks Out Its Shirttails & Flat Footwear for Summer 2026
articles.summary: SummaryThe Row’s Summer 2026 menswear collection embraces effortless luxury with relaxed tailoring, lightweight fabrics, and unbuttoned shirting designed to be worn untucked.Complementing the casual-sartorial balance is a range of minimal footwear, including lambskin sneakers and nappa leather slippers, now available at the brand’s official webstore.For Summer 2026, The Row is leaning into an easier interpretation of its sleek, simply tailored menswear line. Opting for flat-soled shoes and free-hanging shirttails to soften its more tailored silhouettes, the collection is a laid-back expression of the Olsen twins’ elusive luxury label.In the easy, yet intimate lookbook, casual black-and-white photos of the full looks are countered by personal closeups in full color. articles.summary: Name: Coca-Cola x adidas Originals Superstar IIColorway: White/Cream/RedSKU: KH6892MSRP: TBCRelease Date: June 6Where to Buy: adidas JapanCoca-Cola and adidas Originals are releasing a collaborative Superstar II on June 6 as part of a wider six-shoe summer collection. The shoe is built on a weathered white base with cream and red accents and Coca-Cola Classic script branding on the side panel.The design brief here is tight and it executes cleanly. A Footwear White leather upper carries the Superstar's shell-toe silhouette in its most recognizable form, while cream accents soften what could have read as a stark all-white canvas, pushing the shoe toward something warmer and more worn-in. articles.title: Dr. Martens Refreshes the Iconic 1461 Made in England With Two New Colorways
articles.summary: Name: Dr. Martens 1461 Made in England Colorway: Green Buckingham, BurgundySKU: 42467300, 43075600MSRP: $280 USDRelease Date: Available nowWhere to Buy: Dr. MartensDr. Martens has added two new colorways to its 1461 Made in England Shoe, delivering the iconic 3-eye oxford silhouette in Green Buckingham leather and a deep Burgundy finish. Handcrafted in England and built from Classic Calf leather sourced from the C.F. Stead tannery in Leeds, both editions make the case that the 1461's enduring appeal lies less in reinvention and more in the precision of its construction.The material selection here carries real weight. articles.title: Here's a First Look at J Balvin's Friends and Family Exclusive Air Jordan 1 "Black"
articles.summary: SummaryDuring his 41st birthday celebration, global music icon J Balvin revealed an unreleased, all-black sample of his famous 2020 Air Jordan 1 collaborationThe stealthy sneaker maintains the signature jagged, cut-out design of the original release but swaps the vibrant tie-dye for a sleek black canvas and leather constructionBright neon heel badges—featuring Balvin's smiley face, a pink Jumpman, and a special OMERTA logo—break up the tonal upperJ Balvin's 2020 Air Jordan 1 High is widely remembered as one of the most vibrant, color-packed collaborations in Jordan Brand history. articles.title: Chinese apparel exports to US plunge 53 per cent in Q1
articles.summary: WASHINGTON – Chinese apparel shipments to the US fell by more than half in value in the first quarter of 2026 new trade figures show. The latest figures suggest a continued shift in sourcing away from China and towards other Asian suppliers. New data compiled from OTEXA figures shows US apparel imports from China were [...] The post Chinese apparel exports to US plunge 53 per cent in Q1 appeared first on Apparel Insider .

articles.title: Shift in the System: What Nike's 1,400 Tech Layoffs Mean for the Future of the SNKRS App
articles.summary: SummaryNike has announced the layoff of approximately 1,400 employees globally, heavily concentrated within its technology and global operations divisionsRepresenting nearly 2% of the brand's total workforce, the cuts are a key component of CEO Elliott Hill's ongoing "Win Now" strategy aimed at streamlining operations and reversing sales slumpsA major casualty of the restructuring is the SNKRS app team; Nike has confirmed it is merging its SNKRS and main Nike App engineering teams into a single, unified unitThe digital landscape at the Swoosh is undergoing a massive—and painful—reconfiguration. In its second round of major job cuts for 2026, Nike has announced the layoff of approximately 1,400 employees worldwide. While the footwear giant has experienced several workforce reductions recent

In addition to dressing the menswear content creator Wisdom Kaye in full Public School, Dao-Yi and Maxwell joined him on the Met steps, sporting the bespoke boots.In all black, aside from the metallic details, the leather boot fits neatly in the Public School NY street-meets-sleek aesthetic. articles.summary: Zalando is expanding its footwear library with the arrival of the New Balance ABZORB collection. To mark its launch, the retailer serves up a new campaign spotlighting the ABZORB 2000 and 2010 models. Known for its assortment of activations that turn playful concepts into inspiring style, Zalando centers the launch around the humble food truck. Drawing a parallel between the appetites of sneakerheads and foodies, the supporting campaign finds the silhouettes on an alternative menu as individuals queue up to get their hands on a pair. Not forgetting to incorporate a series of fresh fits, the visuals also feature a curation of New Balance garments. articles.title: Shai Gilgeous-Alexander's Converse SHAI 001 Premium Arrives in a Sleek "Steel" Colorway
articles.summary: Name: Converse SHAI 001 Premium "Steel"Colorway: SteelSKU: A23977CMSRP: $150 USDRelease Date: June 11, 2026Where to Buy: ConverseAs Shai Gilgeous-Alexander and the Oklahoma City Thunder push through a fierce Western Conference Semifinals matchup against LeBron James and the Los Angeles Lakers, the superstar point guard's footwear is getting a sharp, playoff-ready upgrade. Converse has officially revealed the SHAI 001 Premium in a striking new "Steel" colorway. Blending high-fashion aesthetics with elite on-court performance, the metallic edition perfectly encapsulates SGA's smooth, calculated, yet highly physical style of play.The "Steel" colorway brings a noticeable sense of luxury to Gilgeous-Alexander’s debut signature model. articles.title: G-DRAGON Unveils the PEACEMINUSONE x Nike Cryoshot for the 2026 World Cup
articles.summary: Name: PEACEMINUSONE x Nike CryoshotColorway: Natural/University RedSKU: HQ1460-100MSRP: $210 USDRelease Date: June 2026Where to Buy: NikeWith the 2026 FIFA World Cup fast approaching, the lines between performance pitch wear and everyday lifestyle sneakers are being completely erased. Leading the charge is Nike with their innovative CryoShot silhouette—a model that takes legendary football boots and encases their spikes in a clear rubber block, creating a standard sneaker fit. To celebrate the global tournament, Nike has tapped a heavy-hitting roster of international collaborators to represent their home countries. Handling design duties for South Korea is none other than G-DRAGON and his PEACEMINUSONE brand, who are breathing fresh life into one of the Swoosh's most beloved archival boots

articles.title: Former Bata leader Uttam Kumar appointed Chief Product Officer at Metro Brands
articles.summary: Footwear retailer Metro Brands Ltd. has appointed Uttam Kumar as its Chief Product Officer & Senior Management Personnel effective from 4th May 2026. In his new role, Kumar will lead product strategy and merchandising, focusing on strengthening portfolio relevance, accelerating speed-to-market, and collaborating with cross-functional teams to build scalable product capabilities that support profitable growth. articles.title: Ferxxo’s Neon Green Salomon XT‑4 OG Is a Raffle‑Only Release
articles.summary: Name: Salomon x Ferxxo XT-4 OG “FERXXOCALIPSIS”Colorway: “FERXXOCALIPSIS”SKU: L47822500MSRP: $200 USDRelease Date: Available NowWhere to Buy: SalomonThe Salomon x Ferxxo XT‑4 OG “FERXXOCALIPSIS” brings bold, neon‑bright energy to the trail‑ready silhouette, merging Colombian music superstar Feid (aka Ferxxo)'s music culture with Salomon’s performance DNA.The XT‑4 OG “FERXXOCALIPSIS” features signature FERXXO green overlays with graphics inspired by Feid’s FERXXOCALIPSIS album artwork, giving the shoe a loud, energetic aesthetic. Synthetic and textile uppers are paired with Salomon’s Quicklace™ system for easy one‑pull tightening. articles.title: NN.07 Collaborates With Grenson on Loafer‑Style Mule
articles.summary: Name: NN.07 x Grenson MuleColorway: BlackSKU: TBCMSRP: $320Release Date: May 13Where to Buy: Grenson, NN.07Grenson has partnered with NN.07 on a footwear collaboration that fuses Copenhagen’s contemporary design ethos with Britain’s storied shoemaking heritage. The project reinterprets the classic moccasin silhouette, drawing inspiration from Grenson’s long tradition of crafting genuine moccasins since the 1960s. The result is a design that celebrates “tradition reimagined,” blending artisanal craftsmanship with NN.07’s forward‑looking design language.Available in limited quantities, the mule is crafted with a soft nappa leather upper and a hand‑stitched gathered apron, delivering a tactile, glove‑like fit.
